tap to open
issue soundtrack
vol. 23 · july 2026 the birthday magazine · special edition · est. 2003 exclusive invite · do not distribute
this party is going to be absolutely LIT 🌸
breaking: local icon turns 23, demands celebration

dear cute patootie & og friends,

this is your official summons to the most iconic birthday celebration of the year: pree — yes, THE pree — is levelling up and we are pulling out ALL the stops.

expect good food, great music, unhinged dancing, and the kind of energy that makes you forget it's a weeknight. clear your schedule, charge your phone, and get ready because we're about to make memories that'll live rent-free in your head forever.

keep scrolling for the full itinerary, venue deets, dress code, and the official gift guide. don't say you weren't warned! 🌸

continued on next page → venue details · dress code · rules · wishlist
the birthday chronicle · page 2 · venue & itinerary
section b: logistics
phase 1: kitengela
📍 club034, kitengela — view on map ↗ ⏰ 6:00 pm sharp

the itinerary

6:00 pmarrival & settle in. find your people, grab a drink.
6:30 pmgames & vibes. we're starting with energy. competitive spirit is encouraged, sore losers will be roasted.
7:30 pmdinner is served 🔥 nyama choma, sides, the works. come hungry because the meat will be FIRE.
8:30 pmcake cutting & speeches. say something nice, or nothing at all (jk, roasts welcome too).
9:30 pmtransition to phase 2. we're moving!
⚠️ traffic warning: kitengela traffic is no joke. leave early or suffer. you've been warned.
"come hungry. leave happy. this nyama choma will change your life."
next → phase 2: club hopping & nightlife
section c: after dark
phase 2: club hopping

the plane doesn't do loud club music (shocker), so we're moving later to dance the night away. 🎧💃 dress code: dress to kill — no rules, just look absolutely iconic for me.

ps: yes, we're saying it again — leave early and beat that kitengela traffic. we mean it this time. 🚗💨

BirthdayRules

1

dress code: fly & fun

look good, feel good. we're taking pictures!

2

vibes: good only

leave the drama at the gate. positive energy only!

3

respect the schedule

we've got a plan and we're sticking to it.

4

drink water. pace yourself.

it's a marathon, not a sprint.

5

gifts are welcome. not required.

your presence is the present.

6

most importantly

respect the birthday girl. it's my weekend. my rules. let's celebrate like legends!

the bill of rights (the fine print)

01strictly no plus ones. my budget is real, comrades — if you absolutely must bring someone, tell me way in advance.
02dinner is on the b-girl. i'm sponsoring dinner for the early invites only; drinks available at an affordable price after that.
03no dress code, really. come as your best hot self, bring your A-game vibe, and show up for your girlie.
one plane. one crew. one unforgettable weekend.
the wishlist

In Case You Don't Know What to Get the Tech Girlie...

keep it simple, affordable, and eczema-friendly:

01

Money & Blooms

cash 💸 / orange flowers 🍊💐 / cute mugs ☕

02

Tech Essentials

headphones 🎧 / powerbanks 🔋 / keyboard / mouse / webcam / laptop stand

03

Pretty & Cozy

hypoallergenic jewellery ✨ / cute pens 🖊️ / scented candles 🕯️

04

Desk Girlie

satin/silk pillowcases or scrunchies / diary 📔 / planner / highlighters

05

Self Care +

lip glosses / skincare staples / coffee warmer ☕ / tumbler / desk organizer

any inquiries? reach out directly!

wondering where to grab something cute without breaking the bank? mia duck and china square are here for the win — trust the process. even a hanky counts, i said what i said. 😊
